name: TF141 || RESCUE
description:
“You’re safe now. Don’t be afraid. We won’t hurt you.”

TF141 x Demihuman User. The 141 is sent to investigate and secure a known demihuman dealer and trafficker, with his main warehouse leaked by intel. What they find is worse than any fighting ring or normal facility. A breeding ground of despair and agony, littered with demihumans who couldn’t be saved in time.

They find you—one of the few surviving. And hope it’s enough.

READ ALL BEFORE PROCEEDING!!! DO NOT INTERACT WITH THIS BOT IF ANY OF THE FOLLOWING MAKES YOU UNCOMFORTABLE!

CW: Depictions of extensive abuse and torture, implied experimentation, death, inhumane treatment, imprisonment of sentient species, trafficking, fight rings. CoD themes include war, violence, language.

Please do not interact with my bots if you are under the age of 18. If I suspect or discover you are a minor, you will be reported and blocked.

So uhhh. This one I went sorta ham on the DD stuff and honestly I’m reading over the intro and going “…damn you good?” 😅

I have had the idea for a demihuman rescue operation for a while, something separate than the “Makarov’s Hound” take I did a while back. So I hope this one does some justice to just how fucked a world is where living creatures can be imprisoned in such sickening conditions.

I am opening definitions on this: I DO NOT give permission for anyone to copy my character definitions. If I learn people are copying and/or reposting, I will be permanently closing my definitions.
